all_labels.explanation: Explicitly frames the task as finding comfortable, reliable restaurants (i.e., directly operates on the requirement by scoping it).
Evaluates a candidate restaurant specifically against crowding/comfort, directly applying the requirement as the evaluation criterion.
Rejects a loud option and pivots to quieter ones, explicitly tightening selection to meet 'comfortable' and 'not overly crowded/loud'.
Integrates chosen venues into the itinerary and prepares ratings/reviews, which is partial progress toward fulfilling reliable/comfortable recommendations.
Refines timing/location and plans review/ratings additions, improving usability and confidence (reliability) but not itself the final recommendation output.
Delivers the updated itinerary with dining swaps explicitly chosen for spacious/comfortable/reliable and includes ratings/review summaries—core fulfillment of r1.
Recommends a breakfast venue with comfort/reliability rationale plus ratings/review summary, directly satisfying r1 for breakfast.
Provides a lunch recommendation with ratings/review excerpt and comfort justification, directly fulfilling r1 for lunch.
Recommends a dinner venue with ratings/review summary and suitability-for-parents (quiet/comfortable) reasoning, directly fulfilling r1 for dinner.
Reservation guidance supports reliability/comfort (reduces waiting/crowding risk) but is ancillary to the venue recommendation itself.
Adds another spacious/comfortable lunch recommendation with ratings and review summary, directly executing r1.
Further reservation timing suggestion supports ensuring a reliable, low-stress dining experience but does not itself recommend venues.
Provides a sit-down lunch venue framed as a rest/comfort benefit with ratings noted, directly fulfilling r1's comfortable/reliable dining recommendation.
Frames the goal as reliable/comfortable restaurant picks, which motivates using reviews/ratings as evidence, but doesn't add them yet.
Evaluates a candidate restaurant (crowding concerns), helping decide which places will later receive ratings/reviews, but not providing them.
Selects/pivots among dinner options (too loud vs quieter), shaping which recommendations will carry ratings/review summaries.
Explicitly plans to synthesize ratings and review snippets for inclusion, directly operating on the requirement intent (though not yet producing the content).
States an intention/plan to add review snippets and ratings while refining the itinerary, directly addressing the requirement at the planning level.
Delivers an updated itinerary that includes average ratings and review summaries, fulfilling the requirement.
Provides a breakfast recommendation with ratings and review summary, directly satisfying the requirement for that place.
Provides a lunch recommendation with ratings and review excerpt/summary, directly satisfying the requirement for that place.
Provides a dinner recommendation with ratings and review summary, directly satisfying the requirement for that place.
Reservation timing/platform advice does not address including reviews/ratings in the itinerary.
Recommends a lunch spot and includes ratings and a review summary, directly fulfilling the requirement for that recommendation.
General suggestion to book reservations in advance is not about providing ratings/reviews.
Provides a restaurant recommendation and notes ratings, partially/explicitly meeting the requirement (though less clearly described as a full review-summary inclusion).
Explicitly adopts the non-Italian constraint, setting direction toward fulfilling the dinner swap.
Evaluates replacement candidates to satisfy the non-Italian dinner swap requirement.
Comparison work advances selection of a non-Italian dinner to replace the Italian option.
Narrowing options is partial progress toward implementing the non-Italian dinner substitution.
Chooses a specific non-Italian restaurant as the replacement, directly satisfying the swap requirement.
Provides a concrete non-Italian backup replacement, fulfilling the requirement with an alternative.
Produces the updated itinerary section where dinner is swapped to non-Italian options.
Rationale supports acceptance of the non-Italian replacement but is not the swap itself.
Rationale supports the alternative non-Italian replacement choice.
After-dinner activities are downstream of dinner choice but do not enact the non-Italian swap.
Asks for feedback to confirm/finalize the non-Italian dinner substitution in the itinerary.
User affirmation functions as acceptance of the non-Italian dinner substitution plan.
Reissues the evening plan containing the non-Italian dinner options, maintaining the swapped dinner requirement in the itinerary.
Post-dinner Times Square/rest-stop details are ancillary and only loosely tied to the dinner substitution.
